name: McNdroid
alternateName: McNdroid: A Longitudinal Multimodal Benchmark for Robust Drift Detection in Android Malware
description: McNdroid is a large-scale, longitudinal, multimodal Android malware detection dataset designed for concept-drift evaluation. It spans samples collected from 2013 to 2025 and provides three aligned modalities: static feature vectors, API call graph/GML features, and JSON-derived behavioral features. Rows across modalities are aligned by sample hash and binary label; the associated loader validates that data, GML, and JSON rows have identical hash order and identical labels before training.

distribution.name: metadata.csv
distribution.description: Sample-level metadata including SHA256 hashes, collection timestamps, labels, and source information.

distribution.name: vendor_family_wide_verdict.csv
distribution.description: Multi-vendor malware family verdicts for label-noise, family attribution, and multi-label learning research.

distribution.name: data-train-feature-files
distribution.description: Sparse SciPy NPZ feature matrices for the static data modality training split.

distribution.name: data-train-meta-files
distribution.description: NumPy NPZ metadata files for the static data modality training split. Each file contains arrays y and hash.

distribution.name: data-test-feature-files
distribution.description: Sparse SciPy NPZ feature matrices for yearly static data modality test splits.

distribution.name: data-test-meta-files
distribution.description: NumPy NPZ metadata files for yearly static data modality test splits. Each file contains arrays y and hash.

distribution.name: gml-train-files
distribution.description: Dense NumPy NPZ files for the GML/API call graph training split. Each file contains arrays X, y, and hash.

distribution.name: gml-test-files
distribution.description: Dense NumPy NPZ files for yearly GML/API call graph test splits. Each file contains arrays X, y, and hash.

distribution.name: json-train-feature-files
distribution.description: Sparse SciPy NPZ feature matrices for the JSON modality training split. The JSON modality uses an additional nested year directory.

distribution.name: json-train-meta-files
distribution.description: NumPy NPZ metadata files for the JSON modality training split. Each file contains arrays y and hashes.

distribution.name: json-test-feature-files
distribution.description: Sparse SciPy NPZ feature matrices for yearly JSON modality test splits. The JSON modality uses an additional nested year directory.

distribution.name: json-test-meta-files
distribution.description: NumPy NPZ metadata files for yearly JSON modality test splits. Each file contains arrays y and hashes.

field.name: hash
field.description: Hash identifier of the Android application sample.

field.name: hash
field.description: Hash identifier of the Android application sample.

recordSet.name: data_train_features
recordSet.description: Training feature records for the static data modality. Features are stored in train_X.npz as a SciPy sparse matrix.

field.name: features
field.description: Sparse static feature vector for one training sample. Loaded from train_X.npz.

recordSet.name: data_train_metadata
recordSet.description: Training metadata records for the static data modality. Labels and hashes are stored in train_meta.npz.

field.name: label
field.description: Binary class label. Loaded from train_meta.npz array y.

field.name: hash
field.description: Sample hash identifier. Loaded from train_meta.npz array hash.

recordSet.name: data_test_features
recordSet.description: Yearly test feature records for the static data modality. Features are stored in test_X.npz.

field.name: features
field.description: Sparse static feature vector for one test sample. Loaded from test_X.npz.

field.name: test_year
field.description: Test year inferred from the path data_feature/processed_data/init_<train_year>/<test_year>/test_X.npz.

recordSet.name: data_test_metadata
recordSet.description: Yearly test metadata records for the static data modality. Labels and hashes are stored in test_meta.npz.

field.name: label
field.description: Binary class label. Loaded from test_meta.npz array y.

field.name: hash
field.description: Sample hash identifier. Loaded from test_meta.npz array hash.

recordSet.name: gml_train
recordSet.description: Training records for the GML/API call graph modality. Each train_X_y.npz file contains arrays X, y, and hash.

field.name: features
field.description: Dense GML feature vector for one training sample. Loaded from train_X_y.npz array X.

field.name: label
field.description: Binary class label. Loaded from train_X_y.npz array y.

field.name: hash
field.description: Sample hash identifier. Loaded from train_X_y.npz array hash.

recordSet.name: gml_test
recordSet.description: Yearly test records for the GML/API call graph modality. Each test_X_y.npz file contains arrays X, y, and hash.

field.name: features
field.description: Dense GML feature vector for one test sample. Loaded from test_X_y.npz array X.

field.name: label
field.description: Binary class label. Loaded from test_X_y.npz array y.

field.name: hash
field.description: Sample hash identifier. Loaded from test_X_y.npz array hash.

field.name: test_year
field.description: Test year inferred from the path gml_feature/processed_data/init_<train_year>/<test_year>/test_X_y.npz.

recordSet.name: json_train_features
recordSet.description: Training feature records for the JSON modality. Features are stored in train_X.npz as a SciPy sparse matrix.

field.name: features
field.description: Sparse JSON-derived feature vector for one training sample. Loaded from train_X.npz.

recordSet.name: json_train_metadata
recordSet.description: Training metadata records for the JSON modality. Labels and hashes are stored in train_meta.npz. The metadata hash key is hashes, not hash.

field.name: label
field.description: Binary class label. Loaded from train_meta.npz array y.

field.name: hash
field.description: Sample hash identifier. Loaded from train_meta.npz array hashes.

recordSet.name: json_test_features
recordSet.description: Yearly test feature records for the JSON modality. Features are stored in test_X.npz.

field.name: features
field.description: Sparse JSON-derived feature vector for one test sample. Loaded from test_X.npz.

field.name: test_year
field.description: Test year inferred from the path json_feature/processed_data/init_<train_year>/<test_year>/<test_year>/test_X.npz.

recordSet.name: json_test_metadata
recordSet.description: Yearly test metadata records for the JSON modality. Labels and hashes are stored in test_meta.npz. The metadata hash key is hashes, not hash.

field.name: label
field.description: Binary class label. Loaded from test_meta.npz array y.

field.name: hash
field.description: Sample hash identifier. Loaded from test_meta.npz array hashes.
